name: marknote
description: MarkNote markup renderer for math, rich blocks, embeds, anchors, comments, and term previews.

scripts.build:browser: npm run build:katex-css && npm run build:browser:module && npm run build:browser:global
scripts.build:katex-css: node -e "const fs = require('node:fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true }); fs.copyFileSync('node_modules/katex/dist/katex.min.css', 'dist/katex.min.css'); fs.cpSync('node_modules/katex/dist/fonts', 'dist/fonts', { recursive: true })"
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run build:browser && node --test test/**/*.test.mjs
